products.name: Fresh Tomatoes
products.description: Locally grown fresh tomatoes, rich in vitamins A and C. Perfect for salads, sauces, and cooking. These vine-ripened tomatoes deliver exceptional flavor and juiciness.

products.name: Organic Apples
products.description: Sweet and crispy organic apples from the orchard. A great source of fiber and antioxidants. Perfect for snacking, baking, or making fresh juice.

products.name: Fresh Broccoli
products.description: Green and fresh broccoli, perfect for healthy meals. Packed with vitamins K and C, folate, and fiber. Great steamed, roasted, or in stir-fries.

products.name: Bananas
products.description: Yellow ripe bananas, great source of potassium and natural energy. Perfect for smoothies, cereal toppings, or a quick healthy snack on the go.

products.name: Carrots
products.description: Fresh orange carrots, crunchy and nutritious. High in beta-carotene, fiber, and vitamin K. Excellent raw, juiced, or cooked in soups and stews.

products.name: Spinach
products.description: Fresh leafy spinach, packed with iron, calcium, and nutrients. Versatile for salads, smoothies, sautéing, or adding to pasta dishes.

products.name: Sweet Potatoes
products.description: Naturally sweet and packed with fiber, vitamins A and C. Perfect baked, mashed, or roasted. A nutritious alternative to regular potatoes.

products.name: Dragon Fruit
products.description: Exotic pink dragon fruit with white flesh speckled with tiny black seeds. Mildly sweet, rich in antioxidants, and visually stunning.

products.name: Kale
products.description: Nutrient-dense superfood loaded with vitamins A, K, and C. Ideal for smoothies, salads, chips, or sautéed as a healthy side dish.

products.name: Strawberries
products.description: Juicy, sweet strawberries bursting with flavor. High in vitamin C and antioxidants. Perfect for desserts, smoothies, or eating fresh.

products.name: Ginger Root
products.description: Fresh ginger root with a warm, spicy flavor. Known for anti-inflammatory properties. Essential for Asian cuisine, teas, and smoothies.

products.name: Avocados
products.description: Creamy Hass avocados, perfectly ripe and ready to eat. Rich in healthy fats, potassium, and fiber. Great for toast, guacamole, or salads.

products.name: Bell Peppers
products.description: Colorful mix of red, yellow, and green bell peppers. Sweet and crunchy, loaded with vitamin C. Perfect for stir-fries, salads, and stuffing.

products.name: Passion Fruit
products.description: Aromatic tropical passion fruit with tangy-sweet pulp. Excellent source of fiber and vitamin C. Perfect for juices, desserts, and cocktails.

products.name: Swiss Chard
products.description: Vibrant rainbow swiss chard with colorful stems. Mild, slightly sweet flavor. Rich in vitamins A and K. Great sautéed or in soups.

products.name: Beetroot
products.description: Deep purple beetroots, earthy and naturally sweet. High in folate, manganese, and nitrates. Great roasted, juiced, or in salads.

products.name: Mangoes
products.description: Alphonso mangoes, the king of fruits. Incredibly sweet and aromatic with smooth, fiber-free flesh. Perfect for smoothies, desserts, and eating fresh.

products.name: Blueberries
products.description: Plump, sweet blueberries packed with antioxidants and vitamins. One of the most nutrient-dense berries. Perfect for snacking, baking, and smoothies.
